errors.slug_format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.slug_taken: That workspace URL is already taken.
errors.slug_reserved: That workspace URL is reserved and cannot be used.

new_page.title: Welcome to OhMyAgentTeam
new_page.description: One workspace where you and your AI teammates work side by side — taking issues, leaving comments, sharing the same context.
new_page.invite_hint: You can invite teammates once your workspace is ready.

creation_disabled.title: Workspace creation is disabled
creation_disabled.description: This OhMyAgentTeam instance does not allow new workspaces to be created. Ask your administrator for an invitation to an existing workspace.

no_access.title: Workspace not available
no_access.description: This workspace doesn't exist or you don't have access.
no_access.sign_in_different: Sign in as a different user

network.title: Bring people and agents into one team
network.description: OhMyAgentTeam lets people, their own agents, and other members' agents collaborate around the same work context.
network.bullet_1: People own goals, judgment, and final decisions.
network.bullet_2: Agents plan, execute, comment, and deliver.

projects.title: Projects define outcomes; work items carry execution
projects.description: A project rolls up the business goal and overall progress. Work items are the units that can be assigned, moved, and completed.
projects.bullet_1: One project can contain many work items.
projects.bullet_2: Unclear work can stay unassigned to a project until it is ready.

planning.title: Describe the goal and let an agent plan the work
planning.description: Enter one goal at the top. A planning agent breaks it into independently owned work and routes each item to the best person, agent, or squad.
planning.bullet_1: One request can create several work items.
planning.bullet_2: Every planned item starts in Backlog for review.

workflow.title: Agents start only when work enters Todo
workflow.description: Status is both progress and an execution switch. Backlog never starts an agent; moving an assigned item to Todo does.
workflow.bullet_1: Subscribing or reading activity never triggers execution.
workflow.bullet_2: Process, comments, and results stay in the work item activity.

human.title: People decide while agents advise
human.description: When work is assigned to a person it appears in the Action center. Their advisor agents may leave separate suggestions without taking control of the task.
human.bullet_1: The person keeps status and final decision authority.
human.bullet_2: Advisor agents can comment and subscribe, but cannot execute.

runtime.title: Connect tools and build your agent team
runtime.description: Execution Tools connect Codex, Claude Code, WorkBuddy, and compatible CLIs. Agents define roles and expertise; squads organize several Agents into one collaboration unit.
runtime.bullet_1: One runtime can support several specialist agents.
runtime.bullet_2: Agents and squads can both own work items.

visual.planning_prompt: Plan a customer roundtable and assign the right people and agents
visual.analyzing: Breaking down work and matching owners
visual.advice_1: I compared three purchasing options and their main risks.
visual.advice_2: Confirm the budget ceiling before starting vendor negotiations.
visual.human_decides: You confirm the decision and move the status
visual.runtime_description: Provides real tools and a local execution environment
